plan.title: S5: docs flip + greenfield/upgrade e2e legs

narratives.Description: Today's docs describe the Go-tarball, committed-.deft/core model, which contradicts the npm resolve-and-copy + gitignored model this epic delivers. This story flips the now-stale committed-payload statements (README, content/events/README.md) and finalizes the docs/ARCHITECTURE.md npm two-package section from a Wave 5 Target note to current behavior, then adds greenfield and upgrade legs to the pinned e2e so the deposit journeys are regression-guarded. It lands last because it documents and tests the behavior the earlier stories implement.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
- Flip the stale current-model statements: README install/payload framing and content/events/README.md '.deft/core/ is a committed payload' to the npm resolve-and-copy + gitignored model, and un-fence the docs/ARCHITECTURE.md Wave 5 Target section to current behavior.
- Add greenfield (nothing -> hybrid) and upgrade (hybrid -> newer hybrid) legs to the pinned release e2e exercising directive init/update deposit without the Go binary.
- Verify the e2e legs run green and the docs no longer assert a committed payload.
narratives.UserStory: As a Deft operator reading the docs, I want the install/architecture docs to describe the npm resolve-and-copy + gitignored model and the e2e to cover the deposit journeys, so that the documentation matches reality and the deposit path is regression-guarded.

items.title: When a reader opens README and content/events/README.md, the text describes the resolve-and-copy gitignored model rather than a committed payload.

narrative.Acceptance: When a reader opens README and content/events/README.md, the text describes the resolve-and-copy gitignored model rather than a committed payload.

items.title: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md renders the npm two-package section as current behavior rather than a Wave 5 Target.

narrative.Acceptance: docs/ARCHITECTURE.md renders the npm two-package section as current behavior rather than a Wave 5 Target.

items.title: The pinned e2e creates greenfield and upgrade deposit legs that exercise directive init and update without the Go binary.

narrative.Acceptance: The pinned e2e creates greenfield and upgrade deposit legs that exercise directive init and update without the Go binary.

items.title: When the e2e legs run, they validate the deposit journeys and complete green.

narrative.Acceptance: When the e2e legs run, they validate the deposit journeys and complete green.

expected_outputs: docs describe the npm resolve-and-copy + gitignored model (no committed-payload claims)
e2e greenfield + upgrade deposit legs green
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Traced to the #1942 documentation-acceptance comment (flip stale committed-payload statements) and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md Wave 5 Target section, not a spec section.

references.title: Issue #1942: TS-native directive init/update deposit + gitignore .deft/core (HARD prereq for Go neuter)
Issue #1912 (frozen Go binary + gate) -- gated on this issue
Issue #1941 (stage-2 migrate) -- owns the vendored->hybrid un-commit transition
